Endpoint Detection and Response API for advanced threat hunting, investigation, and automated response capabilities. The EDR API supports querying threat data, searching devices, retrieving action history, and executing real-time search and response actions across managed endpoints. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials with the soc.act.tg scope.
